summary: Liquid staking grew from near-zero in 2020 into the single largest DeFi category. Lido has dominated throughout. Lido TVL rose from ~$0.01B (end 2020) to ~$11.7B (end 2021), fell to ~$5.9B (end 2022, post-UST/Terra collapse), recovered to ~$21.4B (end 2023), ~$32.5B (end 2024), and peaked at an all-time high of ~$42.5B on 2025-08-23 before retracing to ~$16.1B by mid-June 2026 amid an ETH price drawdown (much of the TVL swing is ETH price, not unstaking). The whole Liquid Staking category set a record of ~$86B on 2025-08-14 (per DefiLlama via The Defiant) and stood at ~$33.9B as of 2026-06-16. On Solana, Jito's liquid staking peaked at ~$3.9B (Jan 2025). Rocket Pool peaked at ~$3.2B (Aug 2025). Coinbase cbETH peaked at ~$0.81B (Mar 2024). Separately, total ETH staked rose steadily from ~2.1M ETH (Nov 2020) to ~8.8M (end 2021), ~15.9M (end 2022), ~29.7M (end 2023), ~34M (end 2024/Jan 2025), ~36.1M (end 2025) and ~39.5M (mid-2026), lifting the ETH staking ratio from ~1.9% (2020) to ~13% (2022), ~15.6% (Apr 2023), to an all-time-high ~33% by 2025-2026. NOTE: TVL is denominated in USD and is heavily driven by the ETH/SOL price; staked-token counts are a cleaner measure of adoption. Confidence: Lido/Rocket Pool/cbETH/Jito series are high (direct DefiLlama API, as-of 2026-06-16). Category-total historical series is medium (Lido-anchored estimates + documented landmarks). ETH-staked series is high-to-medium (CoinGecko, Everstake, The Block).

points.note: Year-end 2020; Lido launched Dec 2020. DefiLlama API.
Year-end 2022, after UST/Terra collapse and bear market. DefiLlama API.
Year-end 2023. DefiLlama API. (Press reported ~$22B ATH on Dec 9, 2023.)
Year-end 2025; retraced from August ATH as ETH price fell. DefiLlama API.
Latest / current value. DefiLlama API as-of 2026-06-16.
Latest / current value. DefiLlama API as-of 2026-06-16.
Year-end 2023. DefiLlama API tracks this protocol slug from Oct 2023; cbETH itself launched Aug 2022. Earlier years not covered by this series.
All-time high in DefiLlama-tracked period. DefiLlama API.
Latest / current value. DefiLlama API as-of 2026-06-16.
Latest / current value. DefiLlama API as-of 2026-06-16.

series.label: Total Liquid Staking category TVL (all protocols, all chains)

points.note: Estimate. Lido alone ~$11.7B; category roughly Lido/~0.8 share. MEDIUM confidence.
Documented landmark: liquid staking derivatives reached $14.09B, second-largest DeFi category (CryptoSlate citing DefiLlama, Feb 2023). HIGH confidence for this point.
Estimate; Lido ~$21.4B at ~0.8 share. MEDIUM confidence.
Estimate; Lido ~$32.5B + Jito/Rocket Pool/Binance etc. MEDIUM confidence.
All-time high; record ~$86B reported by The Defiant citing DefiLlama (2025-08-14), >50% of total DeFi TVL. HIGH confidence for this point.
Current value: sum of all 284 Liquid Staking protocols. DefiLlama /protocols API as-of 2026-06-16. HIGH confidence.

series.label: Total ETH staked (Beacon Chain / consensus layer)

points.note: ~2.1M ETH (~1.9% of supply) shortly after Beacon Chain deposits opened Nov/Dec 2020. CoinGecko.
End 2023 (~29.7M per ultrasound.money; ~30M widely cited). Post-Shapella withdrawals enabled Apr 2023.
End 2024 / early Jan 2025 ~34M ETH (~28% of supply). Everstake / The Defiant.
End 2025: ~36.08M ETH, ~29.3% staking ratio. Everstake Annual 2025 report.
Latest / current ~39.5M ETH, ~32.7% staking ratio (mid-June 2026). Coinlaw / aggregated.

series.label: ETH staking ratio (% of ETH supply staked)

points.note: Crossed 25% of supply staked (The Block / BeInCrypto, late 2024).
All-time-high ~33% (mid-2026); reported peak staking ratio. Crypto Briefing / Coinlaw.

key_facts.value: Mid-2026 USD TVL drop largely reflects ETH price decline, not mass unstaking; staked-ETH count kept rising
